ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: 65% potatoes, 28% high oleic sunflower oil, 7% sea salt and balsamic vinegar flavoured seasoning (maltodextrin, sea salt, dried balsamic vinegar of modena, sugar, acid: citric acid, dried _barley_ malt vinegar, dried aged balsamic vinegar)
